revision.comment: [[:en:Template:Incorrect namespace]] oldid=861252028 より更新、ほか+Documentation
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template||{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|testcases||{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:サンドボックス||</includeonly>{{Mbox
| type = content
| image = [[File:Ambox warning orange.svg|50px]]
| text = {{Error|上のテンプレートは''{{{1}}}''名前空間でのみ呼び出してください。}}
}}<includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{lc:{{{nocat|false}}}}}|false|[[Category:誤った名前空間にテンプレートのあるページ]]|<!-- If nocat=true, then the category is suppressed -->}}}}}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template||{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|testcases||{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Sandbox||{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Template index/Redirect pages|| </includeonly>{{Mbox
| type = content
| image = [[File:Ambox warning orange.svg|50px|link=|alt=]]
| text = {{Error|This template should only be transcluded in the ''{{{1}}}'' namespace(s).}}
}}<includeonly>{{Category handler
|all=[[Category:Pages with templates in the wrong namespace]]
|nocat={{{nocat|}}}
|category2={{{category|¬}}}
}}}}}}}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template||{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|testcases||{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Sandbox||{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Template index/Redirect pages|| </includeonly>{{Mbox
| type = content
| image = [[File:Ambox warning orange.svg|50px|link=|alt=]]
| text = {{Error|This template should only be transcluded in the ''{{{1}}}'' namespace(s).}}
}}<includeonly>{{Category handler
|all=[[Category:Pages with templates in the wrong namespace]]
|nocat={{{nocat|}}}
|category2={{{category|¬}}}
}}}}}}}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

| text = {{Error|This template should only be transcluded in the ''{{{1}}}'' namespace(s).}}
}}<includeonly>{{Category handler
|all=[[Category:Pages with templates in the wrong namespace]]
|nocat={{{nocat|}}}
|category2={{{category|¬}}}
}}}}}}}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>

[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"

}}<includeonly>{{Category handler

|nocat={{{nocat|}}}
|category2={{{category|¬}}}
}}}}}}}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23458359115|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template||{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|testcases||{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Sandbox||{{#ifeq:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|Wikipedia:Template index/Redirect pages|| </includeonly>{{Mbox
| type = content
| image = [[File:Ambox warning orange.svg|50px|link=|alt=]]
| text = {{Error|This template should only be transcluded in the ''{{{1}}}'' namespace(s).}}
}}<includeonly>{{Category handler
|all=|nocat={{{nocat|}}}
|category2={{{category|¬}}}
}}}}}}}}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
</noinclude>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Pages with templates in the wrong namespace]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
